description: ENS verifiable factory contract fork to Hardhat 3.

edit & compile Solidity test with min de.prepare: git checkout -- test/UUPSProxy.t.sol && npx hardhat compile
edit & compile Solidity test with min de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/UUPSProxy.t.sol && npx hardhat compile

edit & compile Solidity test with max de.prepare: git checkout -- test/VerifiableFactory.t.sol && npx hardhat compile
edit & compile Solidity test with max de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/VerifiableFactory.t.sol && npx hardhat compile

edit & compile Solidity contract: src/Ve.prepare: git checkout -- src/VerifiableFactory.sol && npx hardhat compile
edit & compile Solidity contract: src/Ve.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> src/VerifiableFactory.sol && npx hardhat compile
